'''Transport Ships''' were aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] to transport troops or personnel across bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]].

==History==
Such aquatic transports saw extensive use in the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|Liberation of Kashyyyk]], transporting [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] out of the trap set for them in [[Okikuti]], and also transporting Solo, Chewbacca, [[Shoran]], and their forces from their headquarters in [[Chenachochan]] for their raids against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] targets.

==Behind the scenes==
Transport Ships appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
